patterns.name: Valid Accounts
patterns.description: Adversaries attempt to gain access using valid credentials.

patterns.name: Brute Force
patterns.description: Adversaries use brute force techniques to gain access.

patterns.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter: Unix Shell
patterns.description: Adversaries abuse Unix shell commands for execution.

patterns.name: System Information Discovery
patterns.description: Adversaries gather system information for follow-on activity.

patterns.name: System Owner/User Discovery
patterns.description: Adversaries identify the primary user of a system.

patterns.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
patterns.description: Adversaries transfer tools/files into the environment from external systems.

patterns.name: Linux File and Directory Permissions Modification
patterns.description: Adversaries modify file/directory permissions to bypass restrictions.

patterns.name: Scheduled Task/Job: Cron
patterns.description: Adversaries use cron for persistence and scheduled execution.

patterns.name: Account Manipulation: SSH Authorized Keys
patterns.description: Adversaries add SSH keys to maintain persistent access.

patterns.name: Create Account: Local Account
patterns.description: Adversaries create local accounts to maintain access.

patterns.name: Indicator Removal: Clear Command History
patterns.description: Adversaries clear command history to evade detection.

patterns.name: Resource Hijacking
patterns.description: Adversaries hijack system resources (often for cryptomining).

patterns.name: Remote Services: SSH
patterns.description: Adversaries use SSH to move laterally.
